title: AAD IIT Roorkee Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee
short_info: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee (AAD IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Anushruti Academy for the Deaf, IIT Roorkee has released the official notification for 1 Audiologist & Speech Language Pathologist (ASLP)/ Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Degree course in Speech & Audiology (BASLP) / Diploma in Hearing, Language & Speech (DHLS)

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iitr.ac.in/anushruti.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
